productDisplayName: Lee Men's Guns Crownjewel Purple T-shirt
description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed neckline with a multi-coloured twill tape in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Designed for that true lee fan, this purple t-shirt from lee flaunts the silhouette of its founder Henry David Lee in cowboy outfit on the front. So all you Lee fans, don this tee in style and pay tribute to the man who created the brand that has been doling out absolutely comfortable, durable and stylish jeans for the world over for over 100 years now. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
